summary: Minimal Avatar Smart Wallet (MASW) is an immutable delegate‑wallet that any EOA can designate via [EIP‑7702](./eip-7702) (txType `0x04`). Once designated, the wallet's code remains active for every subsequent transaction until the owner sends a new `0x04` to clear or replace it. During each delegated call the EOA is the avatar and MASW's code executes as the delegate at the same address, enabling atomic batched calls ([EIP‑712](./eip-712) signed) and optional sponsor gas reimbursement in ETH or [ERC‑20](./eip-20). The contract offers one primary function, `executeBatch`, plus two plug‑in hooks: a Policy Module for pre/post guards and a Recovery Module for alternate signature validation. Replay attacks are prevented by a global metaNonce, an expiry, and a chain‑bound `EIP‑712` domain separa
title: Minimal Avatar Smart Wallet (MASW)
